meta.description: Triggers on new Creator record. Calls Claude to generate a 6-section content systems spec (platform snapshot, goals, content stack, priority pipelines, brand voice + platform rules, 30-day launch plan). Creates a structured Blueprint page via Notion API, then fires Discord alert.
env_required: NOTION_BLUEPRINTS_DB_ID     — Blueprints DB (same as infra spec)
notion_setup: Creators DB: each record represents a creator brand. Columns used: Name (title), Platforms (multi_select), Primary Format (select), Team Structure (select), Bottleneck (select), Contact Email (email), Submitted At (date), Outcome 30d (rich_text), Brand Tone (select), Content Topics (rich_text), Prohibited (rich_text), Brand Deal Restrictions (rich_text), Approval Workflow (select), Restricted Platforms (rich_text), Monetization (multi_select), Tools Editing/Scheduling/Storage/Analytics (rich_text), Publishing Frequency (select), Blueprint (relation → Blueprints DB)
Blueprints DB: add Blueprint Type (select: Infra Spec / Content Pipeline) if you share one DB for both spec types. Status select must include Draft. Created From Intake checkbox.
Property key strings in Extract Creator Fields must match your actual Creators DB column names exactly.

parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: ($env.CLAUDE_MODEL || 'claude-sonnet-4-6'), max_tokens: 4096, messages: [{ role: 'user', content: $json.prompt }] }) }}

nodes.name: Append Sections 5+6 — Brand Voice + Launch Plan

parameters.name: content
parameters.value:
={{ '🎬 **Content Blueprint drafted: ' + $('Parse Blueprint + Build Blocks').item.json.blueprint_title + '**
> Platform maturity: ' + $('Parse Blueprint + Build Blocks').item.json.platform_maturity + '  |  Brand safety: ' + $('Parse Blueprint + Build Blocks').item.json.brand_safety_level + '
> Creator page: ' + $('Extract Creator Fields').item.json.page_url + '
> Blueprint: ' + $('Create Blueprint Page').item.json.url }}

main.node: Append Sections 5+6 — Brand Voice + Launch Plan
